difficulty_level.description: Players are chased by a spike on the left. It's speed increases as players score is increases. You can set this variable to increase the speed without chaning the score. Calculated by score/100 so if player's score is 2000 the spike speed level will be around 20. The speed of the spike gradually increases from the start.

track_stats.bonus: Players get 10 bonus points when they hit a yellow platform. If they hit fast enough, they can earn up to 5x as a combo.
